pk_tuples.dose_original: ELX 200 mg qd (TRIKAFTA FDC with TEZ 100 mg qd/IVA 150 mg q12h)
pk_tuples.notes: Elexacaftor (VX-445) in CF patients at approved regimen ELX 200 mg qd/TEZ 100 mg qd/IVA 150 mg q12h (FDC tablet, fed state required); population PK model mean Cmax,ss and AUCτ,ss; Tmax median 6 h (4-12); effective half-life 29.8 h; Vd/F 53.7 L; fixed-dose combo with tezacaftor and ivacaftor; units converted from μg/mL to ng/mL (x1000)

Elexacaftor at therapeutic 200 mg qd in healthy subjects; mean AUC at steady state = 186 h*μg/mL (Study 009); additional values: 166 h*μg/mL (Study 001 Part C), 226 h*μg/mL (Study 002); units converted from μg·h/mL to ng·h/mL (x1000)

VX-445 (elexacaftor) supratherapeutic dose 400 mg qd in healthy subjects from thorough QT Study VX18-445-009; mean Cmax 20.9 μg/mL at steady state; tmax ~5 h; units converted from μg/mL to ng/mL (x1000)
